headline: 1 Data Center Stock That’s More Than Doubled Over the Past Year
summary: Quanta Services (PWR) has strong technical momentum and is trading near new all-time highs. The stock is up more than 115% over the past 52 weeks. PWR maintains a 100% “Buy” technical opinion from Barchart. Quanta Services is set to benefit from multi-year contracts in renewable energy and data centers....
